content_en:
Among the most frequently used sections of Al-Adhkar are those dealing with the morning and evening remembrances — the adhkar that the Prophet prescribed for the two bookends of the day. An-Nawawi gathered under these headings the full range of supplications and formulas that the prophetic tradition recommends for these pivotal moments: the formulas of glorification, praise, and declaration of God's oneness and greatness that the Prophet repeated in specific numbers, the supplications for protection from harm, disease, and the evil eye, and the longer formulas that invoke God's mercy and blessings on the day ahead or the night to follow.

The morning adhkar in Al-Adhkar have been particularly influential in shaping the devotional practice of Muslims across the world. The practice of reciting these remembrances after the Fajr prayer has been a feature of Muslim daily life in all the major Islamic cultures, and an-Nawawi's organization of them into a clear, comprehensive sequence made Al-Adhkar the standard reference for scholars and educators seeking to teach this practice. The translations of these sections into virtually every major language spoken by Muslims reflect their practical importance.

The remembrances that follow the five daily prayers receive extensive treatment in Al-Adhkar. An-Nawawi gathered the full range of supplications and formulas that the Prophet prescribed for after-prayer practice: the specific numbers of glorifications, praises, and declarations of God's greatness; the recitation of the Throne Verse; and the various supplications that the Prophet taught his Companions to recite after completing the prayer. The organization and presentation of this material in Al-Adhkar has made it the standard reference for the after-prayer adhkar in the Shafi'i tradition and beyond.

The sections on the night prayer and the remembrances before sleep are among the most spiritually resonant in the book. An-Nawawi gathered the prophetic supplications for lying down, the formulas of remembrance that the Prophet prescribed for the transition from wakefulness to sleep, and the prayers for protection during the night. These sections have made Al-Adhkar a bedside companion for generations of Muslim believers.
content_id:
Di antara bagian-bagian Al-Adhkar yang paling sering digunakan adalah yang berkaitan dengan dzikir pagi dan petang — dzikir yang Nabi ﷺ tetapkan untuk dua penanda hari. An-Nawawi mengumpulkan di bawah judul-judul ini seluruh rangkaian doa dan formula yang direkomendasikan tradisi kenabian untuk saat-saat penting ini: formula-formula tasbih, tahmid, dan tahlil serta takbir yang diulang Nabi ﷺ dalam jumlah tertentu, doa-doa perlindungan dari bahaya, penyakit, dan mata jahat, serta formula-formula yang lebih panjang yang memohon rahmat dan berkah Allah untuk hari yang akan datang atau malam berikutnya.

Dzikir pagi dalam Al-Adhkar sangat berpengaruh dalam membentuk praktik ibadah umat Muslim di seluruh dunia. Praktik membaca dzikir-dzikir ini setelah salat Fajar telah menjadi bagian dari kehidupan sehari-hari Muslim di semua budaya Islam utama, dan susunan an-Nawawi dalam urutan yang jelas dan komprehensif menjadikan Al-Adhkar referensi standar bagi para ulama dan pendidik yang ingin mengajarkan praktik ini. Terjemahan bagian-bagian ini ke dalam hampir setiap bahasa utama yang digunakan oleh umat Muslim mencerminkan pentingnya secara praktis.

Dzikir yang mengikuti lima salat harian mendapat perlakuan ekstensif dalam Al-Adhkar. An-Nawawi mengumpulkan seluruh rangkaian doa dan formula yang Nabi ﷺ tetapkan untuk praktik setelah salat: jumlah tasbih, tahmid, dan takbir yang spesifik; bacaan Ayat Kursi; dan berbagai doa yang Nabi ﷺ ajarkan kepada para Sahabatnya untuk dibaca setelah menyelesaikan salat. Penyusunan dan penyajian materi ini dalam Al-Adhkar menjadikannya referensi standar untuk dzikir setelah salat dalam tradisi Syafi'i dan di luar itu.

Bagian-bagian tentang salat malam dan dzikir sebelum tidur adalah di antara yang paling bermuatan spiritual dalam buku ini. An-Nawawi mengumpulkan doa-doa kenabian untuk saat berbaring, formula-formula dzikir yang Nabi ﷺ tetapkan untuk transisi dari terjaga ke tidur, dan doa-doa perlindungan selama malam. Bagian-bagian ini telah menjadikan Al-Adhkar sebagai teman di samping tempat tidur bagi generasi demi generasi mukmin Muslim.
content_ar: Among the most frequently used sections of Al-Adhkar are those dealing with the morning and evening remembrances — the adhkar that النبي ﷺ prescribed for the two bookends of the day. النووي gathered under these headings the full range of supplications and formulas that the prophetic التراث recommends for these pivotal moments: the formulas of glorification, praise, and declaration of God's oneness and greatness that النبي ﷺ repeated in specific numbers, the supplications for protection from harm, المرض, and the الشر eye, and the longer formulas that invoke God's الرحمة and البركات on the day ahead or the night للاتباع. The morning adhkar in Al-Adhkar have been particularly influential in shaping the devotional practice of المسلمون across the الدنيا. The practice of reciting these remembrances بعد the Fajr الصلاة has been a feature of مسلم daily الحياة in all the major Islamic cultures, and النووي's organization of them into a clear, comprehensive sequence made Al-Adhkar the standard reference for العلماء and educators seeking to teach this practice. The translations of these sections into virtually every major language spoken by المسلمون reflect their practical importance. The remembrances that follow the five daily الصلوات receive extensive treatment in Al-Adhkar. النووي gathered the full range of supplications and formulas that النبي ﷺ prescribed for بعد-الصلاة practice: the specific numbers of glorifications, praises, and declarations of God's greatness; the التلاوة of the Throne الآية; and the various supplications that النبي ﷺ taught his الصحابة to recite بعد completing the الصلاة. The organization and presentation of this material in Al-Adhkar has made it the standard reference for the بعد-الصلاة adhkar in the الشافعي التراث and beyond. The sections on the night الصلاة and the remembrances قبل sleep are among the most spiritually resonant in the الكتاب. النووي gathered the prophetic supplications for lying down, the formulas of الذكر that النبي ﷺ prescribed for the transition from wakefulness to sleep, and the الصلوات for protection خلال the night. These sections have made Al-Adhkar a bedside companion for generations of مسلم المؤمنون.
